overview.description: AI software company delivering tailored ML solutions, optimization tools, fraud detection, and document processing for enterprise clients
overview.description_long: Blindspot Solutions (Blindspot.AI) is a Prague-based AI software company that helps enterprises unlock business value through artificial intelligence. The company delivers 9 ready-made AI products spanning workforce scheduling (OptiPlan), logistics optimization (OptiRoute), smart document reading (ReeDee), anomaly detection (ADF), customer support automation (ARESPO), intelligent video analytics (MACULA), fraud detection (ML FDS), optimization platform (OptiSuite), and intelligent loading (OptiFit). They also provide AI consulting and AI-powered software development services. Since 2017, Blindspot has been part of the Adastra Group, operating as its AI lab. The team draws from top Czech Technical University talent and employs professionals with PhDs from Cambridge, Imperial College, and CTU.
overview.tagline: We help companies unlock business value through artificial intelligence

history.origin_story: Founded in 2014 in Prague by AI researchers with deep ties to the Czech Technical University (CTU). Co-founder Michal Pechoucek is a professor of computer science at CTU and founder of the AI Center there (now CTO of Gen). In 2017, Adastra Group acquired a 50% stake in Blindspot, eventually making it a fully integrated member of the Adastra Group as their AI lab.

key_milestones.event: Adastra Group acquired 50% stake; became member of Adastra Group
Ranked among top 3 fastest growing companies in Central Europe by Deloitte Fast 50
Again ranked in Deloitte Fast 50 top 3 in Central Europe
Co-founder Michal Pechoucek joins Evolution Equity Partners as partner

funding_rounds.details: Adastra acquired 50% stake, later fully integrated

metadata.notes: Blindspot Solutions is the AI lab of Adastra Group since 2017 acquisition. Founded in 2014 with 70+ experts and 300+ projects delivered. Google blocked Glassdoor and revenue searches with CAPTCHA so those fields are null. Employee count of 70+ from company website About page. The company offers both ready-made AI products (9 products) and consulting/development services. Strong academic ties to CTU Prague.
